ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that made the prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target variable */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between prediction and actual data */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value indicating the goodness of fit */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of the prediction */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) of the prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic location of the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable (e.g., 1 wk ahead inc case) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the target variable (e.g., cases, deaths) */,
  "time_window" TEXT /* Time window for the target variable (e.g., 1 week, 2 weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) */,
  "std_error" REAL /* Standard error of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided (e.g., case reports, hospital admissions) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments on the validation results */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "validation_period" TEXT /* Period over which the validation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project associated with the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was fed into the model */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw data provided */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
